exploration_notes: The Kafka Connect REST API does NOT use URL-path-based v1/v2 versioning (e.g., /api/v1/connectors vs /api/v2/connectors). Instead, the 'v1' and 'v2' refer to the Connect group protocol versions (V0=eager, V1=incremental cooperative, V2=sessioned with KIP-507 internal request signing). The REST API resource handlers are: ConnectorsResource (@Path("/connectors")) for the main public connector API, ConnectorPluginsResource (@Path("/connector-plugins")), RootResource (@Path("/")), InternalClusterRes
